nasb.text: He who eats My flesh and drinks My blood has eternal life, and I will raise him up on the last day.

esv.text: Whoever feeds on my flesh and drinks my blood has eternal life, and I will raise him up on the last day.

cnv.text: 吃我肉、喝我血的，就有永生，在末日我要使他復活；

ccb.text: 吃我肉、喝我血的人有永生，在末日，我要叫他复活。

csbs.text: 吃我肉、喝我血的人，就有永恒的生命，在末日我还要使他复活；
